question.text: Within how many days from the end of the half year must a REIT submit its half-yearly financial information to stock exchanges?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Under REIT Regulations, an REIT shall submit its half yearly (audited/unaudited) results within 45 days from the end of the half year. The unaudited results should be accompanied by a Limited Review Report of the Auditors. **The Trap:** 60 days is the timeline for audited annual financial information, not half-yearly. 30 days is for quarterly reports to the trustee. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Both REITs and InvITs share the same financial information timelines: half-yearly = 45 days, annual audited = 60 days from FY end.
